description: Load the world countries dataset from /home/ga/GIS_Data/natural_earth/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp and calculate the GDP per capita for each country. Create a new field named 'gdp_per_capita' (Decimal number, length 20, precision 2) using the formula: ( "GDP_MD_EST" * 1000000 ) / "POP_EST". Export the final attribute table as a CSV file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/countries_gdp_per_capita.csv.
